note: Aspiration inventory (BROWNFIELD-PROTOCOL v0.1 §3) — everything the project intends, harvested at Phase −1 from spec/WAL.md (Next / Known issues / decisions pending), CONTINUE.md next-steps, and ROADMAP.md open milestones. TASKS.md does not exist (recorded; its dangling ROADMAP pointer is DBT-0017). Carry-over guarantee (BROWNFIELD §8): at beta exit every entry reaches done | rescoped | rejected — unaccounted must be zero. States: open | done | rescoped | rejected.

entries.text: Run the first full PROP-013 health audit (fresh breadth-first sweep of the §2.2 checklist — the seed run was not one); re-judge the 10 carried findings; reconcile AUDIT.md with terraform/registry/debt.json

Close the P1 coverage gap: hermetic harness driving GitPackageRegistry against real file:// git repositories named per the fqdn convention, plus a default-path `vibe init` → `vibe install` e2e (no --registry)
PROP-010 — local package cache (M1.20): owner design session to close the five §5 open questions (cache layout, command namespace, staleness signalling, eviction, scaffolding UX), then implement
M1.5 Generation — deferred behind base-machinery-first: LLM provider abstraction (M1.5.1), tool-use loop (M1.5.2), vibe build (M1.5.3), vibe sync (M1.5.4), working example (M1.5.5), §16 acceptance

entries.source: ROADMAP.md M1.5-gate (last open box) + M1 acceptance (docs item)
entries.text: Docs completeness: docs/commands/*.md for every user-facing command (authoring-flow/feat/stack.md exist — verify command coverage, close the checklist)
vibe check deferred checks: #2 dead spec:// references, #3 orphan anchors, #4 anchor uniqueness within a file, #10 implementation coverage; then vibe check --fix

Private registries (token auth for [registry] URLs; per-registry cache keys)

Error-message polish + vibe doctor (what/where/what-to-do per error; --no-color)
Structured telemetry, opt-in (default off)
vibe review --optimize + multi-model comparison (LLM-judge axes; --agents A/B)
Lazy-push / lazy-pull runtime plumbing through vibe-mcp (schema landed in PROP-003 r2; runtime side open)
Scenario generation from real commits (vibe scenario generate/download/view/list; Tessl-compatible layout; vibe eval run)
Speculative directions (unfunded, kept open): interpret mode; multi-stack composition; skill layer; hosted registry; registry explorer over the PROP-005 index
Security-review threat model (research-only; prompt-injection / capability-misrepresentation surface; parked until adoption surfaces real threats)
.gitattributes with `* text=auto eol=lf` — pin the line-ending policy
